UserPromptSubmit.command: bash -c 'D="$PWD"; C=$(test -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" && echo y || echo n); P=$(grep -l "{{" "$D/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null); F=$(find "$D" -maxdepth 2 \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" \) ! -path "*node_modules*" ! -path "*.venv*" ! -path "*.git*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); FG=$(test -d "$D/.forge" && echo y || echo n); if [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD: No CLAUDE.md, no code."; elif [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE7_BROWNFIELD: Code exists but no CLAUDE.md. Will scan and reverse-engineer."; elif [ -n "$P" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD: Placeholder CLAUDE.md, no code."; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE2_SPEC_ONLY: CLAUDE.md exists, no code yet."; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then B=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "fix|bug|broken|error|fail|wrong|crash|302|401|500" | head -1); FT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "add|build|create|implement|new feature" | head -1); IM=$(echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "improve|refactor|optimize|speed|clean|perf" | head -1); if [ -n "$B" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE4_BUGFIX: Bug keywords detected."; elif [ -n "$FT" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE3_FEATURE: Feature keywords detected."; elif [ -n "$IM" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE5_IMPROVE: Improvement keywords detected."; else echo "[FORGE] CASE6_ASK: Existing project. Will ask what to do."; fi; fi; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oP "REQ-\d+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs tracked."; else echo "[FORGE-SYNC] No SPEC.md — will create during flow."; fi'
UserPromptSubmit.description: Deterministic flow routing for /forge — detects all 7 cases

UserPromptSubmit.command: bash -c 'D="$PWD"; if [ ! -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" ] && [ ! -d "$D/.forge" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oP "REQ-\d+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); if [ "$RC" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs in SPEC. Every change MUST reference a REQ."; fi; fi'
UserPromptSubmit.description: Show REQ count on every prompt (only in forge projects)

PreToolUse.command: echo '[FORGE] BLOCKED: Destructive command. User must approve.' && exit 2

bash -c 'T=0; if [ -f manage.py ]; then T=$(uv run python manage.py test --testrunner django.test.runner.DiscoverRunner 2>&1 | grep -c "^OK" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); fi; if [ "$T" = "0" ] && [ -f manage.py ]; then echo "[FORGE] WARNING: Tests not verified. Run: uv run python manage.py test"; fi'

bash -c 'APP=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -oP "apps/[^/]+" | head -1); if [ -n "$APP" ]; then TF="$APP/tests.py"; if [ ! -f "$TF" ] && [ ! -d "$APP/tests" ]; then echo "[FORGE-TDD] No test file at $TF. Write tests FIRST."; fi; fi'
PreToolUse.description: TDD enforcement — warn if writing API code without tests

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'F="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if echo "$F" | grep -q "\.py$"; then python -m ruff check --fix "$F" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -f SPEC.md ]; then echo "[FORGE-SYNC] Tests done. Verify traceability: every [REQ-xxx] → test → code."; fi'
